---
title: "Clara Eleanor Coode"
---

## Clara Eleanor Coode

**Dates:** (1856-1932)

**Maiden name:** (Monro)

### Biography

The Mrs Coode, living in Wells in 1889, who wrote to CMY about the Hannah More memorial, was probably this person, wife of the Rev. Athelstan Coode (1859-1897), who was living in Wells at the time of the 1891 census.

### Letters

- Letter from July 4th 1889

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
